createTeam.title: Create team
createTeam.description: Create a new team to collaborate with your teammates. A dedicated workspace will be created automatically.

toasts.createFailed: Failed to create the team. Please try again.

inviteMember.title: Invite a new member
inviteMember.emailHint: We will send an invitation link to this address.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

toasts.sendFailed: Something went wrong while inviting the member. Please try again.

errors.createAuthRequired: Please sign in before creating a workspace.
errors.personalUnsupported: This version only supports creating team workspaces.
errors.inviteAuthRequired: Please sign in before inviting members.
errors.teamInviteOnly: The current workspace does not support member invitations.
errors.invitePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to invite members.
